title: neottia ehrenbergii
intro: Neottia ehrenbergii, also known as the Chinese orchid, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to China. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Neottia ehrenbergii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote the removal of mucus from the respiratory tract, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Neottia ehrenbergii is commonly prepared as an herbal tea or decoction, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine in the form of a powder or extract.
